name: Shenzhen Neoway Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Neoway Technology Co.,Ltd. provides communications products and related services for Industrial Internet of Things primarily in China. Its products include 2G/3G/4G/NB-IoT/eMTC cellular modules, devices, and solutions, which are used in smart energy, IoV, smart manufacturing, commercial retail, smart city, and other industries. It also provides ODM drives, LPWA modules, automotive grade modules, smart modules, and GNSS modules. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
